items.name: find_workspace_root
items.doc:
Find the workspace root by walking up from `start` looking for Cargo.toml
with `[workspace]`.

items.name: collect_files
items.doc: Collect all source files under `root`, respecting exclude patterns.

items.name: is_source_extension
items.doc: Check if a file extension is a known source extension.

items.name: is_metadata_path
items.doc:
Check if a path is inside a metadata directory (proj/, doc/, man/).
Files in these dirs should not have code checks run on them,
but placement checks should still verify no code files exist there.
